params.SpellDescription: Target opponent reveals each nonland card in their hand. You choose one of those cards. Exile that card. Threshold — If there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, seek a Rat card. It perpetually gains "This spell costs {1} less to cast." You gain 1 life for each Rat card in your hand.
